testcase.name: test_categories_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Categories should return a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'categories': [{'icon': 'film', 'id': 'movie_stars', 'name': 'Movie Stars'}, {'icon': 'tv', 'id': 'tv_actors', 'name': 'TV Actors'}, {'icon': 'music', 'id': 'musicians', 'name': 'Musicians'}, {'icon': 'trophy', 'id': 'athletes', 'name': 'Athletes'}, {'icon': 'crown', 'id': 'royals', 'name': 'Royals'}, {'icon': 'star', 'id': 'reality_tv', 'name': 'Reality TV'}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_16_auth.py:50: in test_categories_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list), "Categories should return a list" E AssertionError: Categories should return a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'categories': [{'icon': 'film', 'id': 'movie_stars', 'name': 'Movie Stars'}, {'icon': 'tv', 'id': 'tv_actors', 'name': 'TV Actors'}, {'icon': 'music', 'id': 'musicians', 'name': 'Musicians'}, {'icon': 'trophy', 'id': 'athletes', 'name': 'Athletes'}, {'icon': 'crown', 'id': 'royals', 'name': 'Royals'}, {'icon': 'star', 'id': 'reality_tv', 'name': 'Reality TV'}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_celebrities_search
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_16_auth.py:57: in test_celebrities_search assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_hot_celebs_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Hot celebs should return a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'hot_celebs': [{'base_price': 0.9, 'category': 'movie_stars', 'hot_reason': "Grey's Anatomy star Eric Dane dies at 53 after ALS diagnosis...", 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/bc/Eric_Dane_%2835417208454%29_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Eric_Dane_%2835417208454%29_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 6.3, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': "Shia LaBeouf's Mardi Gras Arrest Mug Shot Released...", 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a9/Shia_LaBeouf_2022.jpg/330px-Shia_LaBeouf_2022.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 6.3, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'Taylor Swift and KPop stars dominated music in 2025...', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b1/Taylor_Swift_at_the_2023_MTV_Video_Music_Awards_%283%29.png/330px-Taylor_Swift_at_the_2023_MTV_Video_Music_Awards_%283%29.png', ...}, {'base_price': 0.9, 'category': 'reality_tv', 'hot_reason': "Katie Price defies her family's warnings and 'plans to marry husband L...", 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/fd/Katie_Price_2024.jpg/330px-Katie_Price_2024.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 0.9, 'category': 'royals', 'hot_reason': 'Kate Middleton attends rugby match in first public sighting since ex-P...', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e2/Prince_Andrew%2C_Duke_of_York_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Prince_Andrew%2C_Duke_of_York_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 0.9, 'category': 'reality_tv', 'hot_reason': "Katie Price defies her family's warnings and 'plans to marry husband L...", 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/50/Kerry_Katona_crop.jpg/330px-Kerry_Katona_crop.jpg', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_16_auth.py:69: in test_hot_celebs_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list), "Hot celebs should return a list" E AssertionError: Hot celebs should return a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'hot_celebs': [{'base_price': 0.9, 'category': 'movie_stars', 'hot_reason': "Grey's Anatomy star Eric Dane dies at 53 after ALS diagnosis...", 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/bc/Eric_Dane_%2835417208454%29_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Eric_Dane_%2835417208454%29_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 6.3, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': "Shia LaBeouf's Mardi Gras Arrest Mug Shot Released...", 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a9/Shia_LaBeouf_2022.jpg/330px-Shia_LaBeouf_2022.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 6.3, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'Taylor Swift and KPop stars dominated music in 2025...', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b1/Taylor_Swift_at_the_2023_MTV_Video_Music_Awards_%283%29.png/330px-Taylor_Swift_at_the_2023_MTV_Video_Music_Awards_%283%29.png', ...}, {'base_price': 0.9, 'category': 'reality_tv', 'hot_reason': "Katie Price defies her family's warnings and 'plans to marry husband L...", 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/fd/Katie_Price_2024.jpg/330px-Katie_Price_2024.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 0.9, 'category': 'royals', 'hot_reason': 'Kate Middleton attends rugby match in first public sighting since ex-P...', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e2/Prince_Andrew%2C_Duke_of_York_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Prince_Andrew%2C_Duke_of_York_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'base_price': 0.9, 'category': 'reality_tv', 'hot_reason': "Katie Price defies her family's warnings and 'plans to marry husband L...", 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/50/Kerry_Katona_crop.jpg/330px-Kerry_Katona_crop.jpg', ...}, ...]}, list)
